name: Cardiovascular effects of tadalafil.
summary: Review and pooled safety analysis of more than 4000 tadalafil-exposed subjects from clinical pharmacology, phase 2, phase 3, and open-label studies, reporting blood-pressure effects in healthy subjects and mild ED, nitrate interaction hemodynamics, myocardial infarction and stroke incidence rates, and cardiovascular safety interpretation.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level pooled safety and blood-pressure statements.
